title: PPS Pack of 50, 10 inch, Premium Quality Biodegradable, Compostable, Made of Sugarcane Bagasse, Strong 3 Compartment Party Plates, Strong Super Rigid, ECO Friendly Plates, Extra Strength
features: PACK OF 50 , EXTRA STRONG 10" 3 COMPARTMENT PLATES:- Made from high density Bagasse sugar cane pulp Paper Plates are super rigid do not not fall apart crumble or dissolve when used with liquids and hot foods
PERFECT FOR ALL OCCASSIONS, Birthday Parties, Anniversary, Christmas, Picnic, BBQ's or Business Events LUNCH OR DINNER
ECO-FRIENDLY & BIODEGRADABLE:- Our disposable Plates are completely Compostable and will not harm the environment completely non-toxic and Safe.
MICROWAVE & FREEZER SAFE:- These Plates can be Microwaved or Placed in the Freezer, also can be Used for both Hot and Cold foods.
PREMIUM QUALITY:- Our Plates are packaged only after passing rigorous quality testing procedures and are truly the best on the market today
PERFECT NATURAL Alternative to Plastic Plates & Liquid resistant & super strong.
